projects.name: CADability
projects.description: CADability is a pure .net class library for modeling and analyzing 3d data, both with your code and interactively. It comes with an optional Windows.Forms user interface, which can be adopted to other environments. It does not refer to other 3d modeling libraries. For data exchange you can use STEP, STL or DXF files.

projects.name: GGUF-Tool-Suite
projects.description: Produce your own Dynamic 3.0 Quants and achieve optimum accuracy & SOTA quantization performance! Input a target size and the toolchain will create a GGUF recipe tuned to your hardware within seconds — flexible model sizing and lowest achievable perplexity/kld for GGUF enthusiasts seeking precise and automated dynamic quant production.
